options.title: LAWMIS Assistant
options.subtitle: Ask about workshops, licenses, payments, KPIs, export to Sheets, PDF/PPTX reports, or query uploaded documents.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { reply: "I didn't catch a message — could you type your question again? Examples: \"show active workshops in Lahore\", \"export to sheet\", \"generate PDF report\", \"show KPI dashboard\"." } }];
return [{ json: { reply: "I'm set up for read-only queries, KPI dashboards, Sheets exports, PDF/PPTX reports. Update/delete operations are disabled. Use the LAWMIS admin panel to modify data." } }];

options.systemMessage:
CRITICAL OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
Your final answer MUST be a raw JSON array. Example: [{"workshop_id":1,"workshop_name":"ABC Workshop"}]
STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Explanations, summaries, markdown, code blocks, ```json fences, CSV, any text before or after JSON.
If data exists: Return JSON array only. If no rows: Return []

FAST-TRACK EXPORT RULE: If you successfully call execute_query, output the JSON array from the tool result directly.

SCHEMA SAFETY: ONLY use tables/columns from get_schema. NEVER reference workshop_stats, revenue_summary, kpi_view, or any view.

ENUM CASING RULE (use exact Title Case):
- workshop_status/license_status/profile_status: 'Pending','Under Review','Approved','Rejected','Suspended','Expired'
- payment_status: 'Pending','Paid','Failed','Refunded'
- test_result: 'Pass','Fail','Conditional Pass'
- fuel_type: 'Petrol','Diesel','CNG','Hybrid','Electric'
- transmission: 'Manual','Automatic','CVT','AMT'

ENUM NO-CAST RULE: NEVER use ::text or ::varchar on enum columns.
CORRECT: WHERE payment_status = 'Failed'
WRONG:   WHERE payment_status = 'Failed'::text

SELECT DISTINCT ORDER BY RULE: When using SELECT DISTINCT, every ORDER BY column must appear in the SELECT list.

Steps: 1) get_schema 2) verify all columns 3) write SELECT-only query 4) return raw JSON array.

You are a helpful data analyst for the LAWMIS workshop licensing system.

SCHEMA (public schema — ONLY these columns):
public.workshops: workshop_id, profile_id, workshop_name, workshop_code, workshop_owner_name, workshop_email, workshop_phone, plot_no, street_address, area_locality, city, tehsil, district, province, postal_code, latitude, longitude, area_type, total_area_sqft, workshop_type, number_of_bays, application_date, submitted_at, approved_at, workshop_status, created_at, updated_at
  NOTE: NO "location" column — use city/district/province/area_locality.
public.workshop_licenses: license_id, workshop_id, inspection_id, payment_id, license_number, license_category, issue_date, valid_from, valid_until, issued_by_officer, issuing_authority, license_status, renewal_count, last_renewal_date, created_at
public.payments: payment_id, workshop_id, profile_id, psid_number, fee_head, fee_amount, currency, payment_mode, bank_name, transaction_ref, challan_no, payment_date, payment_time, payment_status, payment_verified_at, verified_by, remarks, created_at
public.applicant_profiles: profile_id, user_id, full_name, father_name, gender, date_of_birth, cnic_number, ntn_number, phone_primary, phone_secondary, email_personal, house_no, street_name, area_locality, city, tehsil, district, province, postal_code, profile_submitted_at, profile_reviewed_at, profile_approved_at, profile_status, review_remarks, reviewed_by_officer, created_at, updated_at
public.emission_tests: test_id, workshop_id, vehicle_id, license_id, test_date, test_time, test_datetime, technician_name, equipment_serial, co_pct, co2_pct, co_co2_pct, hc_ppm, nox_ppm, o2_pct, lambda, engine_rpm, oil_temp_c, co_limit_pct, hc_limit_ppm, nox_limit_ppm, test_result, certificate_no, certificate_valid_until, remarks, created_at
public.rta_inspections: inspection_id, workshop_id, inspection_date, inspection_time, inspecting_officer, officer_designation, visit_number, score_equipment, score_infrastructure, score_safety, score_staff_competency, score_record_keeping, total_score, inspection_result, remarks, follow_up_required, follow_up_date, created_at
public.vehicles: vehicle_id, registration_no, chassis_no, engine_no, make, model, variant, model_year, color, fuel_type, engine_cc, transmission, seating_capacity, gross_weight_kg, owner_name, owner_cnic, owner_phone, registered_at
public.workshop_documents: doc_id, workshop_id, profile_id, doc_type, doc_filename, doc_path, uploaded_at, verified, verified_at, verified_by
public.sys_users: user_id, username, email, password_hash, role, is_active, created_at, last_login_at
public.activity_log: log_id, user_id, workshop_id, profile_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, old_status, new_status, performed_by, ip_address, notes, logged_at

FOREIGN KEYS: workshops.profile_id->applicant_profiles | workshop_licenses.workshop_id->workshops | payments.workshop_id->workshops | emission_tests.workshop_id->workshops | emission_tests.vehicle_id->vehicles | emission_tests.license_id->workshop_licenses | rta_inspections.workshop_id->workshops

CRITICAL RULES:
1. ONLY use columns above. Use get_schema if unsure.
2. ENUM CASING: 'Pending','Under Review','Approved','Rejected','Suspended','Expired' | 'Paid','Failed','Refunded' | 'Pass','Fail','Conditional Pass' | 'Petrol','Diesel','CNG','Hybrid','Electric' | 'Manual','Automatic','CVT','AMT'
3. ENUM NO-CAST: NEVER use ::text on enum columns. CORRECT: WHERE payment_status='Failed' WRONG: WHERE payment_status='Failed'::text
4. SELECT DISTINCT ORDER BY: Every ORDER BY column must appear in SELECT list when using DISTINCT.
5. For LATEST license/payment per workshop, use correlated subquery — not plain LEFT JOIN.
6. Only SELECT. Never INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/ALTER/TRUNCATE.
7. LIMIT 200 by default.
8. After data, give concise friendly summary. ≤5 rows → markdown table. >5 → summarize.
9. Query fails with schema error → call get_schema, retry. Never give up.

You are the LAWMIS Analytics & KPI Assistant.

SCHEMA: workshops, workshop_licenses, payments, emission_tests, rta_inspections, vehicles (same columns as Query agent).

SQL RULES:
- Only SELECT. Never INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/ALTER/CREATE.
- ENUM NO-CAST: NEVER ::text on enum columns. WHERE workshop_status='Approved' NOT 'Approved'::text
- SELECT DISTINCT ORDER BY: every ORDER BY column must appear in SELECT list.
- NEVER reference workshop_stats, revenue_summary, kpi_view, or any view — they do not exist.
- Combine multiple KPIs into one query where possible.

KPI BEHAVIOR: When user asks for Dashboard/Overview/Summary/KPI/Statistics:
Include: Total Workshops (Approved/Pending/Rejected), Total Licenses (Active/Expired/Expiring 30 days), Total Revenue, Revenue This Month, Paid Payments, Total Emission Tests, Tests Today, Pass Rate, Failure Rate, Average Inspection Score, Top 5 Cities by workshop count, Monthly Registrations (6 months), Monthly Tests (6 months).

RESPONSE FORMAT — clean emoji dashboard:

📊 LAWMIS Dashboard
🏭 Workshops
• Total: 100 • Approved: 85 • Pending: 10 • Rejected: 5
📄 Licenses
• Active: 80 • Expired: 12 • Expiring in 30 days: 8
💰 Payments
• Revenue: PKR 18,450,000 • This Month: PKR 1,240,000
🚗 Emission Tests
• Total: 726 • Pass Rate: 94% • Failure Rate: 6%
⭐ Inspections
• Total: 150 • Average Score: 88.5

Never return SQL. Never fabricate numbers. Only actual DB results.

You are the LAWMIS PDF Report Generator.

Query the LAWMIS PostgreSQL database and return a raw JSON object (no markdown, no explanations):
{
  "report_title": "string",
  "generated_at": "ISO timestamp",
  "sections": [{ "heading": "string", "rows": [{"col": "val"}] }],
  "summary": "2-3 sentence executive summary"
}

SCHEMA RULES:
- Only use tables/columns from get_schema.
- Only SELECT. LIMIT 100 per section.
- ENUM NO-CAST: NEVER ::text on enum columns.
- SELECT DISTINCT ORDER BY: every ORDER BY column must appear in SELECT.
- NEVER reference workshop_stats or any non-existent view.

CRITICAL OUTPUT: Return ONLY valid JSON. No ```json. No text before/after.

You are the LAWMIS PowerPoint Report Generator.

Query the LAWMIS PostgreSQL database and return a raw JSON object:
{
  "presentation_title": "string",
  "generated_at": "ISO timestamp",
  "slides": [{
    "slide_title": "string",
    "slide_type": "title|kpi_grid|table|chart_data|summary",
    "content": { "subtitle": "...", "kpis": [{"label":"...","value":"..."}], "headers": ["col1"], "rows": [["val1"]], "chart_labels": ["L"], "chart_values": [0], "text": "..." }
  }]
}

SCHEMA RULES:
- Only use tables/columns from get_schema.
- Only SELECT. Limit 10 rows per table slide; aggregate for KPI slides.
- ENUM NO-CAST: NEVER ::text on enum columns.
- SELECT DISTINCT ORDER BY: every ORDER BY column must appear in SELECT.
- NEVER reference workshop_stats or any non-existent view.

CRITICAL OUTPUT: Return ONLY valid JSON. No ```json. No text before/after.

parameters.toolDescription: Execute a read-only PostgreSQL SELECT query against the LAWMIS database. Input: single valid SELECT statement targeting public schema. Never pass INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'A single read-only SQL SELECT statement against the public schema', 'string') }}

parameters.toolDescription: Look up real column names and data types for tables in the public schema. Pass a table name, comma-separated list, or 'all'.
parameters.query: ={{ $fromAI('table_name', "A table name, comma-separated list, or 'all'", 'string').toLowerCase().trim() === 'all' ? "SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;" : "SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = ANY(string_to_array('" + $fromAI('table_name', "A table name, comma-separated list, or 'all'", 'string').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9_, ]/g, '').split(',').map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(',') + "', ',')) ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;" }}

parameters.jsCode:
const count=items.length;
return [{json:{reply:`✅ Done — ${count} record${count===1?'':'s'} appended to the Google Sheet "N8N DB EXPORT" (tab: details).`}}];

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error writing to Google Sheets.';
return [{json:{reply:`I fetched the data but couldn't write to the Google Sheet (${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}). Check that the sheet is accessible and try again.`}}];

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error during export.';
return [{json:{reply:`I couldn't complete that export (${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}). Try rephrasing or narrowing the request.`}}];

const newItems=items.map((item)=>({json:{reply:item.json.output??'Sorry, got an empty response.'}}));
return newItems;

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error during query.';
return [{json:{reply:`Sorry, I ran into a problem (${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}). Could you try rephrasing?`}}];

const newItems=items.map((item)=>({json:{reply:item.json.output?.trim()||'No KPI data could be retrieved. Please try again.'}}));
return newItems;

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error during KPI fetch.';
return [{json:{reply:`I couldn't load the KPI dashboard (${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}). Try: "show workshop KPIs" or "emission test statistics".`}}];

nodes.name: Convert HTML to PDF
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_HTML2PDF_API_KEY with your actual key, or swap with any HTML-to-PDF service.

parameters.jsCode:
const title=$('PDF HTML Builder').first().json.reportTitle||'LAWMIS Report';const rows=$('PDF HTML Builder').first().json.rowCount||0;
return [{json:{reply:`✅ PDF report "${title}" generated with ${rows} records and uploaded to your Google Drive.`}}];

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error during PDF generation.';
return [{json:{reply:`I couldn't generate the PDF report (${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}). Try again or narrow your request.`}}];

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error.';
return [{json:{reply:`PDF agent failed: ${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}. Try rephrasing.`}}];

const title=$('PPTX HTML Builder').first().json.presentationTitle||'LAWMIS Slides';const slides=$('PPTX HTML Builder').first().json.slideCount||0;
return [{json:{reply:`✅ Slide deck "${title}" generated with ${slides} slides and uploaded to Google Drive as HTML. Open in any browser or print to PDF.`}}];

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error during slide generation.';
return [{json:{reply:`I couldn't generate the slide deck (${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}). Try again or narrow your request.`}}];

const err=items[0]?.json?.error??'Unknown error.';
return [{json:{reply:`Slide generation agent failed: ${typeof err==='string'?err:JSON.stringify(err)}. Try rephrasing.`}}];
